title: test
genText:
I. Preparation Tools  
1. Place tools on the table (see photo)  

II. Execution  
1. Begin assembly of components according to the product specifications.  
2. Ensure all fasteners are tightened to the specified torque values.  

III. Final Inspection  
1. Inspect the assembled product for quality standards.  
2. Document any discrepancies and report to the supervisor.
